message:
refactor: centralize version strings and limit constants

Add FRANKENSQLITE_SQLITE_VERSION ("3.52.0") and FRANKENSQLITE_SOURCE_ID
to fsqlite-types as single source of truth. Replace all bare "3.52.0"
literals across builtins, harness, e2e executor, report, and renderer.

Derive SQLITE_MAX_TRIGGER_DEPTH and DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE_BYTES from
fsqlite_types::limits constants instead of local definitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
